author: shygoly
description: Embed a vault-local HTML file inside notes via an html-embed code block. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: shygoly
manifest.description: Embed a vault-local HTML file inside notes via an html-embed code block.
manifest.name: Local HTML Embed

name: Local HTML Embed

releases.author: shygoly
releases.description:
Initial release of Local HTML Embed.

Includes:
- html-embed code block support for vault-local HTML files
- auto mode for same-name HTML files
- optional fixed height or automatic height sizing
- fallback injected styling for common tabbed HTML layouts
